title: Step-loop, stalled detection, and project.json persistence
description: Fix pipeline auto-continue: add step-loop to SKILL.md, stalled-directive detection to watcher, project.json persistence to execute step.

dod.criterion: SKILL.md has a Step Execution Loop section with STOP gates defined
directive-watcher.ts detects stalled directives and sets stalledAt

tasks.title: Add step execution loop to SKILL.md
tasks.scope: In SKILL.md, after the Pipeline Progress Protocol section, insert a Step Execution Loop section.

dod.criterion: A Step Execution Loop section exists in SKILL.md between Pipeline Progress Protocol and Pipeline Steps
Section names the two STOP gates: approve (heavyweight only) and completion (all weights)
Section instructs LLM to immediately read and execute next step doc after each step
No other sections of SKILL.md modified

tasks.title: Add stalledAt field and stall detection to directive-watcher
tasks.scope: Add stalledAt to DirectiveState and stall detection to directive-watcher.ts.

dod.criterion: DirectiveState in server/types.ts has stalledAt?: string | null
buildStateFromDirective sets stalledAt when all stall conditions met
stalledAt is null when any condition not met
console.warn fires once per stalled directive
CEO-action steps (approve, completion) excluded from detection

tasks.title: Add project.json update instruction to 09-execute-projects.md
tasks.scope: Add Update project.json instruction to After Each Task section.

dod.criterion: New Update project.json instruction exists after directive.json update in After Each Task section
Instruction specifies task status, DOD met fields, and updated timestamp
Does not conflict with existing Finalize project.json section
